ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.TITLE4: A Journey of Curiosity and Exploration
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION:
I am a full-stack developer and systems engineer specialized in building high-performance applications and robust architectures.

I help companies and individuals create modern, secure, and scalable solutions by combining software development and infrastructure expertise.

Each project represents an opportunity for me to explore new technologies and deepen my knowledge in software engineering, system architecture, and performance optimization.

TECH.DESC_SPRING: Java framework for building robust backend applications and microservices.

TECH.DESC_ANGULAR: Frontend framework for building modern and dynamic web interfaces.
TECH.DESC_TYPESCRIPT: JavaScript superset that enables more maintainable frontend applications.
TECH.DESC_REST: Design and development of secure REST APIs for communication between services.
TECH.DESC_MICROSERVICES: Distributed architecture enabling scalable and modular system development.
TECH.DESC_DOCKER: Containerization platform for deploying and isolating applications.
TECH.DESC_LINUX: Administration and management of Linux systems for server environments.
TECH.DESC_CICD: Automation of build, testing, and application deployment processes.
TECH.DESC_UML: Modeling of software systems using class, sequence, and component diagrams.
TECH.DESC_BPMN: Business process modeling for analyzing and designing workflows.
